calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Expunge Arbitration From The Cetral Registry Depository Record Of Toni Sutherland
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TONI SUTHERLAND'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Expunge Arbitration From The Cetral Registry Depository Record Of Toni Sutherland is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Expunge Arbitration From The Central Registry Depository Record Of Toni Sutherland
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: PETITIONER TONI SUTHERLAND'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Expunge Arbitration From The Central Registry Depository Record Of Toni Sutherland is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
